task.title: Creating COBOL programs from a template
task.shortdesc: You can create new COBOL programs from a template.

keywords.indexterm: creating COBOL programs from a template

taskbody.prereq: To specify the program location on a partitioned data set or a sequential data set, you must have an existing MVS subproject.

context.p: For more information about modifying the program template, see .
For more information about COBOL templates, see .

steps.stepsection: To create a new COBOL program from a template, complete the following steps:

step.info: You can also use the Ctrl+N key combination.

step.cmd: In the New COBOL Program panel, complete the following steps:

substep.cmd: Specify the author of the program.

substep.info:
The options are as follows: Partitioned Data Set Specify the following parameters:
Remote location
Host code page
Data set name
Member
Allocate PDS if new You can specify the data set characteristics in the next wizard panel.
Sequential Data Set Specify the following parameters:
Remote location
Host code page
Data set name You can specify the data set characteristics in the next wizard panel.
Local file You can specify the parent folder in the next wizard panel.

substep.cmd: You can also select the following options:

dlentry.dd: When the program is generated, comment templates are added.

The Snippets view is a clipboard-like feature that inserts chunks of text into source editors. You can use this feature for chunks of code (for example, algorithms and data definitions) that you commonly insert into any source file.

substep.cmd: Click Finish to create the program or Next to continue to the next step.

step.cmd: Perform one of the following actions:

choices.choice: For a local file, select the parent folder in the Local COBOL Program panel.

For data set locations, select the data set characteristics in the Data Set Allocation panel: Copy characteristics from an existing data set Select an existing connected data set.
Specify characteristics by usage type You can set the following characteristics: Category
SOURCE
LISTING
Others
Type
ASM
C/C++
COBOL
JCL
PL/I
REXX
Specify characteristics Select this option to set advanced allocation characteristics.

substep.cmd: Click Finish to create the program or Next to continue to the next step.

step.cmd: If you specified a data set in step 5, specify the characteristics for the new PDS or sequential file in the Data Set Characteristics panel:

substep.cmd: Click System Managed Storage to specify the following parameters:
Click Finish to create the program or Next to continue to the next step.

step.cmd: In the COBOL Program Features panel, select the features to be used in the COBOL program.
step.info: Features provide a way to initially generate COBOL programs that perform operations similar to other programs. This initial generation is accomplished by naming and using common sections of code that go in each division.

substep.cmd: To set the features, select one or more of the following checkboxes:
Click Finish to create the program, or select features and click Next to continue to the next step.

step.cmd: In the COBOL Compiler Options panel, override compiler options.
Click Finish to create the program.
